mapper.select: SELECT bs.id AS shareId, bs.message AS shareMessage, bs.is_read AS isRead, bs.create_time AS shareTime, b.id AS bookId, b.title AS bookTitle, b.author AS bookAuthor, b.cover_url AS coverUrl, u.id AS senderUserId, u.nickname AS senderNickname, u.avatar AS senderAvatar FROM book_share bs JOIN sys_book b ON b.id = bs.book_id JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = bs.sender_id WHERE bs.receiver_id = #{userId} ORDER BY bs.create_time DESC
